scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix agent-backend && npm install --prefix custom-mcp-server && npm install --prefix dashboard
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix agent-backend && npm run build --prefix custom-mcp-server && npm run build --prefix dashboard
scripts.build:railway: npm ci --include=dev --prefix custom-mcp-server && npm run build --prefix custom-mcp-server && npm ci --include=dev --prefix agent-backend && npm run build --prefix agent-backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build:mcp
